items.name_en: M13408 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag Louis Vuitton SARAH Wallet series classic! Murakami interior design clever, with many pockets and card slots. Made of pure copper hardware with soft calfskin... exquisitely crafted, paired with Swiss imported zippers, synchronized with the boutique, practical and versatile essential. Size 19x10cm.

items.name_en: M13409 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Coin Purse This timeless Louis Vuitton x Murakami series zipper coin purse combines practical function with a playful style, appearing even more vibrant this season. The coin purse is made of Monongram coated canvas and paired with cheerful rainbow tones, paying tribute to the distinctive color style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The coin purse features a silver zipper and multiple internal compartments, keeping coins, bills, and business cards neatly organized.

items.name_en: M13409 Black Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
M13409 Black Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
As part of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue, the timeless Zippy coin purse is practical and playful, elevated for this season. Made from Monogram coated canvas with joyful rainbow tones that match the artist's signature pop palette. It features a silver zip closure and is divided into multiple compartments for coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm

The key coin purse features a silver zipper and comes with a chain and hook for securely storing keys.

items.name_en: M13679 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. This Venice backpack is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, incorporating personalized cherry embroidery into the Monogram denim canvas, vividly interpreting the artist's colorful whimsy. Refined leather outlines the slender straps, and bright buckles accent the flap and exterior pocket. Dimensions: 24*7*26cm. (Excludes doll)

items.name_en: M13922 Black & Color! LV x TM Zipper Bag! A classic from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, reinterpreting the Monogram pattern with the artist Takashi Murakami's signature rainbow tones. The Monogram features a smartphone-specific pocket and can also hold keys, a passport, credit cards, and cash. Easily store personal essentials, the perfect travel companion. Size 19Cmx10cm.

items.name_en: M13988 Black Top-tier replica, changed code chip 163c
items.name_cn:
M13988 Black Top-tier replica, changed code chip 163c
This Keepall Cargo Bandoulière 25 bag is crafted from shiny calfskin, conveying Pharrell Williams' dandy aesthetic through an elegant, understated urban design. The Louis Vuitton Paris patch is cleverly fixed to the bag body with beaded rivets, and the main compartment zipper pull is embellished with LV lettering. 15 x 11 x 25 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_en: M14098 Black Color Full Steel Hardware! Chip Version, Phone Pouch Métis! The unique reproduction series Phone Pouch Métis is crafted in colored Monogram coated canvas, injecting vitality into this daily essential. The bag's flap design is specifically for storing smartphones and keys, paired with silver riveted corner guards and S-lock closure, paying tribute to the brand's iconic hard suitcase elements. The bag comes with a detachable chain strap for multiple carrying options.

items.name_en: M14162 Murakami! This Zippy wallet is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, featuring playful Monogram flowers on Monogram coated canvas, interpreting the Japanese artist's 'Superflat' style. With an all-around zip closure, it features practical elements such as multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and a large ticket pocket. 21 x 12 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).

items.name_cn:
M14163 ( - )
The small Victorine wallet is elevated with a vibrant multicolor Monogram pattern from the re-edition of the Louis Vuitton x Murakami series, refreshing the house's iconic signature with the Japanese artist's rainbow tones. Made of coated canvas with a refined calfskin lining and silver hardware. A zip pocket holds coins, while the interior has multiple compartments for bills and cards.
Size: 12 x 9.5 x 2.5cm
